programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: In 1993, the U.S. sends special forces into Somalia to destabilize the government and bring food and humanitarian aid to the starving population. Using Black Hawk helicopters to lower the soldiers onto the ground, an unexpected attack by Somalian forces brings two of the helicopters down immediately. From there, the U.S. soldiers must struggle to regain their balance while enduring heavy gunfire.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: Following the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001, Osama bin Laden becomes one of the most-wanted men on the planet. The worldwide manhunt for the terrorist leader occupies the resources and attention of two U.S. presidential administrations. Ultimately, it is the work of a dedicated female operative (Jessica Chastain) that proves instrumental in finally locating bin Laden. In May 2011, Navy SEALs launch a nighttime strike, killing bin Laden in his compound in Abbottabad, Pakistan.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Three bodies bitten by humans and animals are found in a shallow grave; Garcia and Reid hide their preparation for a company fitness test from Morgan.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Morgan's visit with a survivor of unusual stabbings in upstate New York leads to more questions about the case.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The discovery of two murder victims in West Virginia uncovers a long-simmering feud between two families.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team searches for a commonality when a series of target abductions take place; Savannah is frustrated with Morgan's traveling.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When people are killed by arsenic poisoning and handwritten death threats are found, the team pursues a suspect fascinated by Greek mythology; Hotch is worried about participating in a Career Day at Jack's school.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When prostitutes are murdered in Texas, their deaths seem to have religious overtones; members of the team are put at risk throughout the course of the investigation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The investigation in Texas reveals a deep web of corruption; Garcia must save a friend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: Iconic British wildlife resides in the Scottish Highlands, which has undergone a vast transformation since the Ice Age.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events
programme.desc: The cameras follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive until the return of the great migration; as weeks turn to months, the pride members become frailer, and the number of cubs dwindles from seven to two.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events
programme.desc: An amazing look at the annual return of millions of salmon to the streams where they were born; the survival of North American grizzly bears depends on this natural event.

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: After making a speech in Moscow vowing to never negotiate with terrorists, President James Marshall boards Air Force One with his family and advisers. When a group of terrorists led by Ivan Korshunov hijacks the flight, the President's principles are put to the test. Feigning escape, ex-solider Marshall stows away in the aircraft and must race against time to rescue his family and everyone else on board.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: In 1993, the U.S. sends special forces into Somalia to destabilize the government and bring food and humanitarian aid to the starving population. Using Black Hawk helicopters to lower the soldiers onto the ground, an unexpected attack by Somalian forces brings two of the helicopters down immediately. From there, the U.S. soldiers must struggle to regain their balance while enduring heavy gunfire.

programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: Following the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001, Osama bin Laden becomes one of the most-wanted men on the planet. The worldwide manhunt for the terrorist leader occupies the resources and attention of two U.S. presidential administrations. Ultimately, it is the work of a dedicated female operative (Jessica Chastain) that proves instrumental in finally locating bin Laden. In May 2011, Navy SEALs launch a nighttime strike, killing bin Laden in his compound in Abbottabad, Pakistan.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: In April 1945, the Allies are making their final push in the European theater. A battle-hardened Army sergeant named Don "Wardaddy" Collier, leading a Sherman tank and a five-man crew, undertakes a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Hopelessly outnumbered, outgunned and saddled with an inexperienced soldier in their midst, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds as they move to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team must play a dangerous war game that leads to very real consequences for one team member.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to rely on information from questionable sources while trying to stop a criminal bent on stealing government secrets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a petty officer and discovers he may have been leading a violent secret life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to put in overtime while searching for a suspect presumed dead when working on a case over Christmas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee is held captive in a women's prison after a guard's murder leads to a takeover.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After Ducky is stabbed at a crime scene, the team uncovers disturbing secrets from the doctor's past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Planet Earth: Life
programme.desc: The diversity of animals and plants, and stories of survival in nature; capuchin monkeys use stone hammers; killer whales hunt seals; an elephant herd follows the matriarch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Planet Earth: Life
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica; frogs hunt bats; Komodo dragons track buffalo; snakes that live and breed in the sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gridiron Gang
programme.desc: A counselor (The Rock) at a juvenile detention facility decides to turn the young inmates in his charge into a football team to give them a sense of self-respect and social responsibility, but he faces opposition from high-school coaches who do not want their players facing criminals on the field.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives believe vengeance is the motive for the shooting of a private military contractor, found dead in his hotel room.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bank executive must assist in a robbery in order to save his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A diner shooting leads detectives Fontana and Green to a desperate gunman seeking revenge for the death of his baby sister of AIDS at a children's hospital.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A newspaper reveals the identity of an undercover police officer, resulting in her murder, so Detectives Green and Fontana search for the source of the leak.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detective Falco finds slashed to death in his bathroom the young woman he took home the night before.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy risks his career when he uses a corrupt DEA agent (Ritchie Coster) to lure psychopathic killers out of hiding.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Tabloid photography may have played a role in a fatal burglary attempt; ADAs Jack McCoy and Consuela Rubirosa argue the use of shield laws to protect celebrity journalism.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
